version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="text-contrast" name="Text Contrast"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-232" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="0" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="760" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="review-frame" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="560" width="920" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="low-contrast-card" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#475569;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=14;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontColor=#94a3b8;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=8;" value="Muted status note<br>still too hard to read" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="130" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="small-text-threshold-card" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#6b7280;strokeColor=#4b5563;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=14;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=8;" value="Small text threshold<br>must still fail" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="410" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="large-text-threshold-card" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#6b7280;strokeColor=#4b5563;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=20;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontColor=#d1d5db;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=8;" value="Large text threshold<br>may pass" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="690" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inherited-low-contrast-surface" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#475569;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="130" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inherited-low-contrast-label-text" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontColor=#94a3b8;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=8;" value="Detached label<br>should resolve surface" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="130" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="readable-card" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#475569;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=14;fontFamily=Noto Sans JP;fontColor=#e2e8f0;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=8;" value="Readable status<br>should not fire" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="410" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
